intended_use: TRAQinform IQ is a software only device that provides a quantitative TRAQinform Report on lesions identified as Regions of Interest (ROI) in PET/CT DICOM compliant imaging data acquired, interpreted,
intended_use_full: TRAQinform IQ is a software only device that provides a quantitative TRAQinform Report on lesions identified as Regions of Interest (ROI) in PET/CT DICOM compliant imaging data acquired, interpreted, and reported on per local practice prior to device use.
target_condition: Cancer progression assessment (breast, lung, prostate, melanoma, head & neck, lymphoma, colorectal, gynecological)
ground_truth: Adjudication panel of two radiologists and one oncologist reviewed imaging and local reporting for 32 discordant cases
other_metrics: Positive Percent Agreement (PPA): 78% (14/18); Negative Percent Agreement (NPA): 36% (5/14); Overall Percent Agreement (OPA) 95% CI: 41% to 76%; ROI-level agreement: new 70% (37/53), increasing 70% (18/26), unchanged 85% (11/13), decreasing 63% (5/8), disappearing 90% (10/11); Test-retest limits of repeatability: SUVmax -27.0% to 56.8%, SUVmean -20.2% to 38.5%, SUVtotal -54.1% to 144.5%, Volume -52.6% to 113.9%
